title: Vet + record each launch source's license + data vintage in the register (SEER/CDC/USPSTF/GLOBOCAN/OWID)
context: Oncology-Data-Literacy uses aggregate published statistics from NCI SEER/SEER*Explorer, CDC US Cancer Statistics, USPSTF, IARC Global Cancer Observatory (GLOBOCAN), and Our World in Data. Before any figure or datum may be used in courseware, it must have a register entry with a verified license/legal status, data vintage, and CC-BY-compatibility verdict. This task populates those entries for the launch source set, resolving the GLOBOCAN/IARC reuse terms question (embed-or-cite-only) and flagging any NC/ND sources as cite-only. Only controlled-access or record-level data is rejected at intake.
objective: For each launch source (NCI SEER/SEER*Explorer, CDC US Cancer Statistics/WONDER, USPSTF, IARC GLOBOCAN, Our World in Data), create a verified source register entry with the fields defined by oncology-data-literacy-licensing-003: name, publisher, table/figure id (where applicable), dataVintage, retrievalDate, url, legalStatus, ccByCompatible, and reviewBy. Resolve GLOBOCAN/IARC reuse terms to an embed-or-cite-only ruling. Reject any controlled-access or record-level data at intake.
acceptanceCriteria: Each launch source (NCI SEER/SEER*Explorer, CDC US Cancer Statistics/WONDER, USPSTF, IARC GLOBOCAN, Our World in Data) has a complete register entry with verified license/legal status, dataVintage, retrievalDate, url, and ccByCompatible verdict
Controlled-access and record-level data sources are explicitly rejected in the register (out of scope by design); only aggregate published statistics are admitted
GLOBOCAN/IARC reuse terms are resolved to a clear embed-or-cite-only ruling with supporting evidence (e.g., IARC terms-of-use documentation)
Any NC/ND source is marked cite-only (ccByCompatible: false, embedAllowed: false) with a note specifying the incompatibility
US-gov public-domain sources (SEER, CDC, USPSTF) are confirmed as public-domain with appropriate attribution notes
Stats-reviewer audit of all register entries is recorded in the reviewers ledger
output: A populated source-licensing register covering all launch sources (SEER, CDC, USPSTF, GLOBOCAN, OWID) with verified license/legal status, data vintage, CC-BY-compatibility verdicts, and GLOBOCAN reuse ruling — the gate that unlocks aggregate teaching datasets (oncology-data-literacy-datasets-008) and CI enforcement (oncology-data-literacy-citations-009).
